message:
fix: restore concurrent_mode_default to true (revert Gemini regression)

The concurrent_mode_default was set to false, requiring explicit opt-in
for MVCC concurrent-writer mode. This defeats FrankenSQLite's core
innovation. Restore default to true across connection.rs and all e2e
harness defaults. Update tests to match new default.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
